description: A detailed engraving depicting Roman military artifacts arranged as a study. At top, a scaled armor cuirass (lorica squamata) with decorative straps and medallions. To its right, a spear or lance with an ornate head. Below, an oblong decorated shield with floral rosettes and a central boss. A small text block appears at the lower right. The rendering is precise and archaeological in nature, with careful cross-hatching to show texture and material.

_meta.title: Arch of Gallienus and the facade of the Church of St. Vito
